items.title: 3 Button Soulbeast Power 32.9k
items.rotation:
Priority is Axe 4, Axe 5, Spam 'Sic Em' off cooldown. Try to finish your auto
              attack chains.
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity ranger build for fractal/raid/strike
              content.

              As always I am a warrior main so lmk if you know of a way to improve this. This will be fine anywhere
              though.

items.title: 4 Button Soulbeast Condi 30.2k
items.rotation:
Priority is Axe 4, Dagger 2. Cast them after an auto attack (don't finish auto chains). 
              Spam "Sharpening Stone" and "Vulture Stance" off cooldown. Precast "Sharpening Spines" (you can cast them 
              throughout for a damage boost, no cast time).
items.explanation:
This is a beginner/low intensity ranger build for fractal/raid/strike content. I was originally going to label it a hybrid build but I changed my mind. 66% of the damage is condi. Although there is larger than average power component here.

I spent a while trying to crack the 3 button 30k for this, I couldn't find it. I barely managed to reach over 30k with 4 lol.

As always I am a warrior main and this is the best I've found after some time of trying stuff. Let me know if you see ways to improve it or see a different approach entirely! Would be interesting to see a 3 button 30k. Thanks.
